title: Unlit Campfire Placement
description: Campfires will be unlit when placed, requiring you to light them instead!
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) ⚠️**

# 🔥 Unlit Campfire Placement
- **Campfires are unlit when placed down**, requiring you to ignite them using a Flint and Steel
- **Building with Campfires** is now easier
- **Compatible with vanilla clients**, without any disparity
